name: extend-document-viewer-sidebar
title: Document Viewer Sidebar
author: Extend UI contributors
description: Switches a thumbnail rail between inline and overlay modes from measured viewer width while preserving open and closed states.

changes: Replaced physical left, margin, and border utilities with logical equivalents, mirrored the overlay exit direction in RTL, and disabled the entrance transition for reduced motion.

notices: Direct dependency licenses are recorded in registry/sources/extend-ui/DEPENDENCIES.md.

modifications.change: Replaced physical left, margin, and border utilities with logical equivalents, mirrored the overlay exit direction in RTL, and disabled the entrance transition for reduced motion.
modifications.reason: Make the source-backed sidebar directionally correct and respect the user's motion preference without changing its responsive behavior.
